app.name: 1 In A Billion
app.tagline: Find rare compatibility through deep matching across multiple spiritual systems.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.accountExists: Account already exists. Please sign in.
home.secret.label: You're in a secret matching lab.
home.laboratory.title: My Souls Laboratory
home.photo.preview.title: portrait
home.photo.permission.title: Permission Required
home.photo.permission.message: Please allow access to your photo library to upload a photo.
home.photo.error.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to upload a photo.
home.matchAlert.title: Match found
home.matchAlert.message: We found a match for you. Tap the big number to open Soul Gallery.
home.matchStatus.label: Match status
home.matching.found.singular: WE FOUND A MATCH FOR YOU
home.matching.notFound: BUT THE 1 IN A BILLION IS STILL OUT THERE
home.matching.registered.title: Registered!
home.matching.modal.title: How Matching Works
home.matching.modal.paragraph1: We compare your birth signature across five spiritual systems: Astrology, Numerology, Human Design, Gene Keys, and Kabbalah.
home.matching.modal.paragraph2: Your number shows people with strong algorithmic resonance to your profile. The system does this automatically in the background.
home.matching.modal.paragraph3: There is no swiping. You can open Soul Gallery anytime and see your current matches. When a new resonance appears, your match number updates.
home.resetAlert.title: Full Reset
home.resetAlert.message: This will clear ALL local data (AsyncStorage, stores, caches) and sign you out. Continue?
home.resetAlert.success: All local data has been cleared. The app will restart.
readings.error: Failed to generate reading. Please try again.
empty.noReadingsMessage: Generate your first reading to see it here.
empty.noPeopleMessage: Add someone to start exploring compatibility.
empty.noConversationsMessage: Start a conversation with a match.
error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: We hit an unexpected issue. You can try again or go back to the home screen.
error.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

settings.deleteAccountWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

settings.matchAlerts.enable.message: Allow push + email alerts when your first match appears?

validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be 50 characters or less

accountDeletion.title: Delete Account
accountDeletion.subtitle: We're sad to see you go. Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data.
accountDeletion.section.title: What Will Be Deleted
accountDeletion.confirmDialog.title: Delete Account?
accountDeletion.confirmDialog.message: This will PERMANENTLY delete your account and ALL data. This action CANNOT be undone.
accountDeletion.success.title: Account Deleted
accountDeletion.success.message: Your account has been permanently deleted.
peopleList.title: My Karmic Zoo
peopleList.empty.message: No people saved yet. Generate a reading to save profiles.
peopleList.empty.description: When you generate compatibility readings, people and their data will be saved here.
peopleList.delete.error.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own profile.
peopleList.delete.title: Delete person
peopleList.clearAll.title: Clear all data
peopleList.clearAll.message: This deletes local people, readings, audios, and PDFs from the device.
personPhotoUpload.title: Upload Portrait
personPhotoUpload.note.text: Your photo is transformed into a stylized portrait for visual consistency and privacy.
personPhotoUpload.error.requiresNative: Photo upload requires a native build with image picker support.
personPhotoUpload.updatePortrait.title: Update portrait?
personPhotoUpload.updatePortrait.message: Choose a new photo to regenerate this stylized portrait.
personPhotoUpload.notFound.title: Person Not Found
coreIdentities.error.missingBirthDataMes: Please add birth date + city first.
coreIdentities.error.invalidLocationMess: Your birth city is missing coordinates. Please go back and select a valid city from the list.
contactSupport.title: Support
contactSupport.card.title: Need help?
contactSupport.card.text: Our team is here to assist you with any questions or issues you may have while exploring the laboratory.
contactSupport.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
contactSupport.faq.q1.question: How long does a reading take?
contactSupport.faq.q1.answer: Most readings are generated within 30-60 seconds. Complete readings may take slightly longer.
contactSupport.faq.q2.question: Can I access my readings offline?
contactSupport.faq.q2.answer: Yes, once a reading is generated, it is saved to your device for offline access in My Library.
myLibrary.title: My Souls Library
myLibrary.subtitle: Your people, readings, and next actions.
myLibrary.empty.message: No tracked readings yet. Start a deep reading to see live status here.
generatingReading.error.missingJobMessag: Missing job receipt. Please start the reading again.
generatingReading.message.title: Deep Dive Readings Take Time
generatingReading.message.text: You can leave this screen. Your job keeps running in the background.
generatingReading.status.label: Status
jobDetail.title: Preparing Your Reading
jobDetail.readiness.label: Readiness: {{summary}}
jobDetail.button.waitingForAssets: Waiting for Text + Audio + Song + PDF
intro.tagline: Find rare compatibility through deep matching across multiple spiritual systems.
intro.resetAlert.title: Reset App
intro.resetAlert.message: This will delete ALL your data (readings, people, account) and reset the app. Continue?
intro.resetAlert.success: All data has been deleted and app reset.
intro.authAlert.title: Sign Out
intro.authAlert.message: By signing out you would delete all your user data and history. Are you sure?
intro.entitlement.title: Continue onboarding
intro.entitlement.message: Finish onboarding and subscription to unlock dashboard access.
intro.access.failed.title: Access check failed
intro.access.failed.message: Could not verify your subscription right now.
about.title: About
about.description.intro: 1 In A Billion is a spiritual laboratory designed to help you explore the deep patterns of your soul.
about.section.mission.title: Our Mission
about.section.mission.text: We combine ancient wisdom with modern technology to provide profound insights into your personality, relationships, and life path.
about.section.technology.title: The Technology
about.section.technology.text: Our system uses precise astronomical data from the Swiss Ephemeris and advanced AI to interpret complex astrological placements across multiple systems: Western Astrology, Vedic Astrology, Human Design, Gene Keys, and Kabbalah.
dataPrivacy.title: AI & Data Usage
dataPrivacy.intro: 1 In A Billion uses advanced artificial intelligence to generate your personalized astrological readings and compatibility reports.
dataPrivacy.section.sharing.title: What data do we share with AI?
dataPrivacy.section.sharing.text: We share birth data (date, time, location) and calculated planetary positions with our AI providers. We do NOT share your name, email, or any identifying information.
dataPrivacy.section.privacy.title: Privacy First
dataPrivacy.section.privacy.text: Your privacy is our priority. All AI processing is done securely, and we do not use your data to train public models.
generatingReading.status.complete: Complete - view it in My Library
systemSelection.bundleDescription:
16 in-depth readings across every system
with a comprehensive final verdict

pricing.subtitle: Unlock the stars. Pick the tier that resonates with you.
